violations.description: Spec file is 595 lines, exceeding the TEA maintainability target for focused review and change safety.
violations.suggestion: Split by behavior cluster (ensure/create, duplicate suppression, concurrency, refusal).

violations.description: Durability side-effect assertion block is duplicated in multiple scenarios.
violations.suggestion: Extract an assertion helper (e.g., assertDurabilityEnvelope) and reuse it.

violations.description: Mapping + signed webhook setup is repeated across scenarios with minor variation.
violations.suggestion: Create reusable setup helpers/builders for mapping and webhook request dispatch.

violations.description: Long inline IDs/labels are repeated and increase visual noise across tests.
violations.suggestion: Centralize repeated test-id labels in story-local constants.

recommendations: Split the 595-line spec into smaller behavior-focused files
Extract reusable assertion/setup helpers for webhook and durability checks
Consolidate repeated scenario labels and deterministic token keys
summary: Maintainability is the main quality constraint due to file size and duplicated setup/assertion logic.
